compiled_state.title: Replace remaining 37 non-echo pipe-to-grep-q SIGPIPE patterns in tests
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description
The completion verifier identified 37 remaining pipe-to-grep-q patterns that use non-echo generators (grep, sed, printf, head, find, git). These are SIGPIPE-vulnerable under set -o pipefail.

Find them: grep -rn '|.*grep -q' tests/ | grep -v 'echo.*|.*grep -q'

Replace with bash-native equivalents or herestrings, same as the echo|grep -q replacements.

## TDD Exemption
Exempt — mechanical replacement, no conditional logic change (criterion 1).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Zero pipe-to-grep-q patterns remain in tests/
  Verify: test "$(grep -rn '|.*grep -q' tests/ | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" -eq 0
- [ ] All modified test files pass
  Verify: for f in $(git diff --name-only); do bash "$f" 2>&1 | tail -3; done
- [ ] No syntax errors
  Verify: for f in $(git diff --name-only); do bash -n "$f" || exit 1; done

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: All pipe-to-grep-q patterns replaced in 24 files ✓
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Syntax checks PASSED (27/27 files). Test results: workflows 7/7, agents 4/4, hooks 102/103 (1 pre-existing failure: test-record-test-status-centrality.sh), scripts 224/226 (2 pre-existing: test-ticket-list-transition-comment-e2e.sh, test-wrapper-parity.sh), skills 33/34 (1 pre-existing: test-bug-close-reason-guidance.sh). Zero new failures introduced.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — grep -rn '|.*grep -q' tests/ | wc -l = 0. All 37 patterns removed from 27 files. No new test failures introduced.
comments.author: Test
